## Checklist
- [ ] I tested locally (or in paper mode)
- [ ] I did not commit secrets (keys, config.json, logs, data)
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] Risk controls remain intact (daily loss/weekly stop/max trades/limit-only)

## Validation
- CI should pass (`CI / ci`)
